description_for_human: Free, private audio and video transcription service that runs entirely in your browser
description_for_model: A completely free transcription service that converts audio and video files to text using OpenAI's Whisper model. Runs entirely in browser via WebAssembly for complete privacy. No registration required, no file uploads to servers. Supports multiple audio formats (MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC) and video formats (MP4, MOV, AVI). Can also translate foreign audio to English. Perfect for transcribing lectures, interviews, meetings, podcasts, and voice recordings.
